insights.title: TEDx: Kids Hacker Camps — teaching children to make, not just consume
insights.excerpt: A TEDx talk on what happens when you put Arduino, Raspberry Pi, and a growth mindset in the hands of Kenyan children. Co-presented with Wachira Ndaiga, drawing on the research behind Waza Experience and the Kids Hacker Camps programme.

insights.title: iamscience: Teaching high school girls to tinker with Arduino
insights.excerpt: A coding week programme with the Goethe Institute introducing high school girls in Kenya to tinkering, hardware, and programming through Arduino. Part of a broader effort to close the gender gap in STEM through hands-on, maker-first learning.

insights.title: When my own website was hacked, I realised security isn't just an IT problem
insights.excerpt: A personal account of getting hacked — and what it revealed about how we think (and don't think) about digital security as product builders and digital practitioners.

insights.title: Building MVPs as a creative outlet — MVP 1
insights.excerpt: What happens when you treat product building as a personal practice? The first in a series on using rapid MVP development to explore ideas, sharpen thinking, and ship things that matter.

insights.title: Six lessons from conducting EdTech research in Kenya
insights.excerpt: Four years of evaluating EdTech programmes across mobile learning, curriculum development, and early childhood education in Kenya — distilled into six lessons every practitioner should know before deploying.

prototypes.name: TinkerWith Me
prototypes.description: A structured eLearning environment for Robotics & AI — giving young learners and educators access to guided courses, project pathways, and hands-on learning sequences in one place.

prototypes.name: TinkerWith Me — DIY Selector
prototypes.description: A curriculum selector prototype for Robotics & AI — helps young learners and educators navigate hands-on project pathways based on age, interest, and skill level. The self-guided companion to the full TinkerWith Me platform.

prototypes.name: Secure360
prototypes.description: A cyber security assessment tool that helps individuals and teams understand their digital security posture through structured, plain-language evaluation.

prototypes.name: Anchor
prototypes.description: A self-regulation gym — a wellbeing tool that guides users through evidence-based practices for emotional regulation, focus, and resilience. Learning that starts from the inside out.

prototypes.name: Digital Prayer Companion
prototypes.description: A reflective digital companion for personal prayer and spiritual journaling — offering guided prompts, scripture, and space for quiet daily practice.

prototypes.name: Track My Chumz
prototypes.description: A personal budgeting tool designed for the Kenyan context — helping users track income, expenses, and savings goals with a simple, mobile-friendly interface.

prototypes.name: Career Templates AI
prototypes.description: AI-assisted career document builder — generates tailored CVs, cover letters, and LinkedIn summaries. Designed to help job seekers in African markets put their best foot forward.

prototypes.name: Reset Guide
prototypes.description: A new-year reflection and goal-setting simulator for individuals and groups — walks users through a structured reset process using a gears metaphor to align values, habits, and intentions.

prototypes.name: DPIA Safe Lab
prototypes.description: A Data Protection Impact Assessment sandbox — guides organisations through DPIA exercises to identify privacy risks in learning products and digital systems.
